description_long: This object is a stop sign featuring a classic octagonal shape with a raised border and the word 'STOP' embossed in the center. The sign face is primarily gray with a red border, and the text is also rendered in the same color as the face, rather than the typical white. The sign is mounted on a straight, cylindrical pole that extends downward from the center of the sign's bottom edge. The overall construction appears solid and utilitarian, with a matte finish and no visible fasteners or mounting brackets. The sign is designed to be easily recognizable and to convey a clear message to drivers and pedestrians in urban environments.
description: A gray octagonal stop sign with a red border and embossed 'STOP' text, mounted on a vertical pole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full octagonal sign face, red border, and 'STOP' text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical pole.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front but without visible text details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and pole.
